patches: S/Startup-Sequence autostarts Scorched_TanksV1.90 with corrected file metadata
Injected ADF is mounted once through vAmigaWeb insert_file(0) with reset-on-load semantics

verification.exact_result: v1.90 autostart media has valid boot metadata; local browser proof mounted the ADF once with audio running and no repeated reset loop, but the AROS firmware path still does not reach playable Scorched Tanks.
verification.compatibility_port_result: Live public browser proof at tinyassets.io hit Kade with a real canvas click, Big Shot, and WebAudio running; this is a labeled fallback, not exact original-game proof.
